name: @symphony-board/android
description: Android thin-client shell for the Symphony Board read-only UI.

scripts.init: tauri android init --ci && pnpm run prepare:generated
scripts.dev: pnpm run prepare:generated && tauri android dev
scripts.run: pnpm run prepare:generated && tauri android run
scripts.build: pnpm run prepare:generated && tauri android build --ci
scripts.build:apk: pnpm run prepare:generated && tauri android build --apk --ci
